FB-1_board_publisher_email_filter_end_to.approach: Server-side BountyRoutes.getTasks() now resolves ?publisherId=<email> via findAgentByEmail BEFORE the WHERE clause; sentinel null returned for unregistered email (returns empty list, not 404 — list() semantics).

RC-1_config_imAddress_dead_code.approach: Deleted get imAddress() getter + DEFAULTS.IM_ADDRESS entry + toConfigItems BOUNTY_IM_ADDRESS entry. Only doc-comment references remain (in migration guide).

RC-2_server_rejects_legacy_body_address_.approach: resolveActor() refactored to discriminated union { actor } | { error: { status, message } }. Legacy body.publisherAddress / body.agentAddress now return 400 'use publisherEmail: <your-registered-email>'. Unregistered valid email returns 404 'No registered agent for email' (Q3 ✅).

RC-3_server_rejects_query_address_param.approach: im-routes getMessages() + getMessagesForAddress() now reject ?address= query with 400 'use ?email=<your-registered-email>'. getMessagesForAddress now also requires ?email= (was: silently returns [] on missing).
